Off Calendar Dec-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Vincent Ian Parrett of BERGESON LLP (408-291-2756), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Willard E. Bartel and David C. Peebles, Administrators of the Estate of Roy Jackson, deceased
John E. Herrick of MOTLEY RICE (843-216-9100), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Willard E. Bartel and David C. Peebles, Administrators of the Estate of Roy Jackson, deceased
Andrew I. Port and Cheryl A. Morris of EMARD DANOFF PORT TAMULSKI & WALOVICH LLP (415-227-9455), appearing for defendants / responding parties American President Lines, Ltd., individually and as successor in interest to American Mail Line; and Matson Navigation Company, Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS WILLARD E. BARTEL AND DAVID C. PEEBLES, ADMINISTRATORS OF THE ESTATE OF THE ROY JACKSON'S MOTION FOR ADMISSION PRO HAC VICE OF JOHN HERRICK

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' application for admission pro hac vice of John Herrick pursuant to CRC 9.40 is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kim Richardson of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #5915 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

RULING:
DEFENDANTS AMERICAN PRESIDENT LINES, LTD., INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO AMERICAN MAIL LINE, AND MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Hearing held. The Court took defendants American President Lines, Ltd.'s individually and as successor in interest to American Mail Line, and Matson Navigation Company, Inc.'s demurrer to complaint under submission. Each side submitted a proposed order for the Court's consideration. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kim Richardson of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #5915 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
